calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise Hearing (As To Minor Jessi Ratliff)
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of the Disputed Claim of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtedary, Esq. appeared for the law firm of Brayton Purcell.
Bruce Ahnfeldt, Esq. appeared for petitioner Terri Ann DeRose, the guardian ad litem for the minors Jessi and Mark Ratliff.
The Court waived the appearance of the guardian ad litem and the minors at the last calling of the case.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $559,929.62.
Attorney's Fees - $161,799.30.

The net balance of $398,130.32 shall be to be deposited into blocked accounts with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 901 Main Street, Napa, CA 94559 as follows: $199,065.16 for Jessi Ratliff, and $199,065.16 for Mark Ratliff. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minors reache the age of 18 years.

Additionally, all future settlements for the minors shall be placed in blocked accounts as described in paragraph 12 of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Minor'S Compromise Hearing (As To Minor Mark Ratliff)
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Minor'S Compromise Hearing (As To Minor Jessi Ratliff)
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Continued To Oct-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for the law firm of Brayton, Purcell, et al.
Bruce Ahnfeldt, Esq. appeared with petitioner Terri Ann DeRose, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Jessi Ratliff and Mark Ratliff, who were also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Due to a dispute between Brayton, Purcell and Bruce Ahnfeldt on the issue oa attorney fees, this matter is CONTINUED to October 6, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for further hearing on the petition to approve the compromise of the disputed claim of the minors. Appearance of the guardian and the minors is waived at the next calling of the case.
